heading: Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
label: 30312 Distribution of assets on dissolution or final liquidation
text: On dissolution or final liquidation of the corporation, any assets remaining after the discharge of all liabilities shall be transferred to the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to be applied to the care and comfort of blinded veterans.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)3031236:865., , ; , , .Aug. 27, 1958June 13, 1991Pub. L. 85–769, § 1572 Stat. 927Pub. L. 102–54, § 13(n)(4)105 Stat. 278The word “satisfaction” is omitted as included in “discharge”, and the word “obligations” is omitted as included in “liabilities”. The word “outstanding” is omitted as unnecessary. The words “Secretary of Veterans Affairs” are substituted for “Department of Veterans Affairs” because under 38:303 the Secretary is the head of the Department.
